texto: ...you needs uh man.” Janie laughed at all these well-wishers because she knew that they knew plenty of women alone
autor: that she was not the first one they had ever seen. But most of the others were poor. Besides she liked being lonesome for a change. This freedom feeling was fine. These men didn’t represent a thing she wanted to know about. She had already experienced them...
